== 誕生日 == * [[寛元]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1246年]][[3月26日]]） - [[日興]]{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}、僧侶（* [[1333年]]）

== できごと == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[702年]][[4月9日]]） - [[文武天皇]]が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]]（度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}}。 * [[宝永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1708年]][[4月28日]]） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[4月20日]]） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]]河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]]を築く
== 誕生日 == * [[寛元]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1246年]][[3月26日]]） - [[日興]]{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}、僧侶（* [[1333年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[4月20日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（* [[1797年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}

==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar March}} ''March 8'''<!--Lunar March8--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[702年]][[4月9日]]） - [[文武天皇]]が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]]（度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}}。 * [[宝永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1708年]][[4月28日]]） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[4月20日]]） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]]河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]]を築く
== Births == * [[寛元]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1246年]][[3月26日]]） - [[日興]]{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}、僧侶（* [[1333年]]）
== Deaths == * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[4月20日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（* [[1797年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}

{{Lunar March}} '''March 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 8'''<!--Lunar March8 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]][[Category:仏滅]]である。
--> == Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[702年]][[4月9日]]） - [[文武天皇]]が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]]（度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}}。 * [[宝永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1708年]][[4月28日]]） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[4月20日]]） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]]河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]]を築く
== Births == * [[寛元]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1246年]][[3月26日]]） - [[日興]]{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}、僧侶（* [[1333年]]）
== Deaths == * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[4月20日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（* [[1797年]]）

[[sn:March 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]] [[zh:三月初八]] [[en:draft:March 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]2年（[[Julian Calendar]][[702]][[4月9日]]） - [[文武天皇]]が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]]（度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}}。 * [[宝永]]5年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1708]][[4月28日]]） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831]][[4月20日]]） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]]河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]]を築く
== Births == * [[寛元]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1246]][[3月26日]]） - [[日興]]{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}、僧侶（* [[1333]]）
== Deaths == * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858]][[4月20日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（* [[1797]]）

== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[702]][[4月9日]]） - [[文武天皇]]が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]]（度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}}。 * [[宝永]]5年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1708]][[4月28日]]） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * [[天保]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1831]][[4月20日]]） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]]河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]]を築く

[[sn:March 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]] [[zh:三月初八]] [[en:draft:March 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}}.
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]2nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[702]][[4月9日]]） - [[文武天皇]]が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]]（度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}}。 * [[宝永]]5th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1708]][[4月28日]]） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * [[天保]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1831]][[4月20日]]） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]]河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]]を築く
== Births == * [[寛元]]4th year（ユリウス暦[[1246]][[3月26日]]） - [[日興]]{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}、僧侶（* [[1333]]）
== Deaths == * [[安政]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1858]][[4月20日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（* [[1797]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}

== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[702]] [[4月9日]] ） - [[文武天皇]] が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]] （度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}} 。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[4月28日]] ） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1831]] [[4月20日]] ） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]] 河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]] を築く
== Births == * [[寛元]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1246]] [[3月26日]] ） - [[日興]] {{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }} 、僧侶（* [[1333]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]] [[zh:三月初八]] [[en:draft:March 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[702]] [[April 9]] ） - [[文武天皇]] が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]] （度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}} 。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[April 28]] ） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1831]] [[April 20]] ） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]] 河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]] を築く
== Births == * [[寛元]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1246]] [[March 26]] ） - [[日興]] {{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }} 、僧侶（* [[1333]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 20]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（* [[1797]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}

[[sn:March 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]] [[zh:三月初八]] [[en:draft:March 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[702]] [[April 9]] ） - [[文武天皇]] が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]] （度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}} 。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[April 28]] ） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1831]] [[April 20]] ） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]] 河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]] を築く
== Births == * [[寛元]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1246]] [[March 26]] ） - [[日興]] {{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }} 、僧侶（* [[1333]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 20]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（* [[1797]] ）

[[sn:March 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]] [[zh:三月初八]] [[en:draft:March 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[702]] [[April 9]] ） - [[文武天皇]] が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]] （度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}} 。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[April 28]] ） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1831]] [[April 20]] ） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]] 河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]] を築く
== Births == * [[Kangen]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1246]] [[March 26]] ） - [[日興]] {{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }} 、Monk侶（* [[1333]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 20]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（* [[1797]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:March 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]] [[zh:三月初八]] [[en:draft:March 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[702]] [[April 9]] ） - [[文武天皇]] が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]] （度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}} 。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[April 28]] ） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1831]] [[April 20]] ） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]] 河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]] を築く
== Births == * [[Kangen]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1246]] [[March 26]] ） - [[日興]] {{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }} 、Monk侶（* [[1333]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 20]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（* [[1797]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}

== Events == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[702]] [[April 9]] ） - [[文武天皇]] が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]] （度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}} 。 * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 5th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1708]] [[April 28]] ） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1831]] [[April 20]] ） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]] 河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]] を築く
== Births == * [[Kangen]] 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1246]] [[March 26]] ） - [[日興]] {{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }} 、Monk侶（* [[1333]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1858]] [[April 20]] ） - [[大原幽学]] 、農政学者（* [[1797]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[702]] {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}}) – {{ill|Bunmu Tennō|ja|文武天皇}} established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1708]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1831]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * {{ill|Kangen|ja|寛延}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1246]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Nikkō Tennō|ja|日興}}, a monk (died [[1333]])<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}</ref>.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1858]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|ja|大原幽学}}, an agricultural scholar (born [[1797]]).

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Daibō|ja|大宝}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[702]] {{ill|April 9|ja|4月9日}}) – {{ill|Bunmu Tennō|ja|文武天皇}} established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1708]] {{ill|April 28|ja|4月28日}}) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1831]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * {{ill|Kangen|ja|寛延}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1246]] {{ill|March 26|ja|3月26日}}) – {{ill|Nikkō Tennō|ja|日興}}, a monk (died [[1333]])<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}</ref>.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1858]] {{ill|April 20|ja|4月20日}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|ja|大原幽学}}, an agricultural scholar (born [[1797]]).
== Commemorations == <!-- Add commemorations if needed -->
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]]

16 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:3月8日 (旧暦) up to rev 82042829
revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月8日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[702年]][[4月9日]]） - [[文武天皇]]が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]]（度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}}。 * [[宝永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1708年]][[4月28日]]） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[4月20日]]） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]]河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]]を築く
== 誕生日 == * [[寛元]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1246年]][[3月26日]]） - [[日興]]{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}、僧侶（* [[1333年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[4月20日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（* [[1797年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[3月8日 (旧暦)]] to [[March 8 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月8日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[大宝 (日本)|大宝]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[702年]][[4月9日]]） - [[文武天皇]]が、初の全国的に統一された[[計量単位]]（度量衡）を定める{{要出典|date=2021-02}}。 * [[宝永]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1708年]][[4月28日]]） - 京都で大火（宝永の大火）。約1万4千軒焼失 * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[4月20日]]） - 大坂町奉行・新見正路が、[[旧淀川|安治川]]河口を浚渫した土砂で[[天保山]]を築く
== 誕生日 == * [[寛元]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1246年]][[3月26日]]） - [[日興]]{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750年慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 }}、僧侶（* [[1333年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[4月20日]]） - [[大原幽学]]、農政学者（* [[1797年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|March 8|qq=March 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:702|702]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Bunmu Tennō]] established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1831|1831]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'en|Kangen]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1246|1246]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Nikkō Shōnin|Nikkō Tennō]], a monk (died [[:en:1333|1333]])<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 |qq=}}</ref>.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural scholar (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308|qq=}}
==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月初八]]
{{translated page|ja|3月8日 (旧暦)|version=82042829|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q838873]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 8|qq=March 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:702|702]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Bunmu Tennō]] established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1831|1831]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'en|Kangen]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1246|1246]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Nikkō Shōnin|Nikkō Tennō]], a monk (died [[:en:1333|1333]])<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 |qq=}}</ref>.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural scholar (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初八]][[zh:三月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838873]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 8|qq=March 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:702|702]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Bunmu Tennō]] established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1831|1831]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'en|Kangen]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1246|1246]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Nikkō Shōnin|Nikkō Tennō]], a monk (died [[:en:1333|1333]])<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 |qq=}}</ref>.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural scholar (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 8일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月初八]][[zh:三月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初八]][[zh:三月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q838873]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:02, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 8|qq=March 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:702|702]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Bunmu Tennō]] established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1831|1831]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'en|Kangen]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1246|1246]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Nikkō Shōnin|Nikkō Tennō]], a monk (died [[:en:1333|1333]])<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 |qq=}}</ref>.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural scholar (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Taiho|Daibō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:702|702]] [[:en:April 9|April 9]]) – [[:en:Emperor Monmu|Bunmu Tennō]] established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708]] [[:en:April 28|April 28]]) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1831|1831]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * [[:en:Kan'en|Kangen]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1246|1246]] [[:en:March 26|March 26]]) – [[:en:Nikkō Shōnin|Nikkō Tennō]], a monk (died [[:en:1333|1333]])<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 |qq=}}</ref>.
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:April 20|April 20]]) – [[:en:Ōhara Yūgaku|Ōhara Yūgaku]], an agricultural scholar (born [[:en:1797|1797]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|702|en|702|WD=Q23497|lt=702}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Bunmu Tennō}} established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1708|en|1708|WD=Q6846|lt=1708}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}}) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1831|en|1831|WD=Q7579|lt=1831}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|WD=Q1145723|lt=Kangen}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1246|en|1246|WD=Q5441|lt=1246}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|WD=Q2456|lt=March 26}}) – {{ill|Nikkō Shōnin|en|Nikkō Shōnin|WD=Q373169|lt=Nikkō Tennō}}, a monk (died {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}})<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 |qq=}}</ref>.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|en|Ōhara Yūgaku|WD=Q11433147|lt=Ōhara Yūgaku}}, an agricultural scholar (born {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初八]][[zh:三月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初八]][[zh:三月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:三月初八]][[zh:三月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|March 8|qq=March 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|702|en|702|WD=Q23497|lt=702}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Bunmu Tennō}} established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1708|en|1708|WD=Q6846|lt=1708}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28}}) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1831|en|1831|WD=Q7579|lt=1831}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|WD=Q1145723|lt=Kangen}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1246|en|1246|WD=Q5441|lt=1246}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|WD=Q2456|lt=March 26}}) – {{ill|Nikkō Shōnin|en|Nikkō Shōnin|WD=Q373169|lt=Nikkō Tennō}}, a monk (died {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333}})<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 |qq=}}</ref>.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|en|Ōhara Yūgaku|WD=Q11433147|lt=Ōhara Yūgaku}}, an agricultural scholar (born {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}}).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|7|3|9|2|8|4|3|0308|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 8''' is the 8th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|WD=Q423370|lt=Daibō|1=Taiho}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|702|en|702|WD=Q23497|lt=702|1=702}} {{ill|April 9|en|April 9|WD=Q2504|lt=April 9|1=April 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|WD=Q357246|lt=Bunmu Tennō|1=Emperor Monmu}} established Japan’s first nationally unified system of measurement (度量衡).{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1708|en|1708|WD=Q6846|lt=1708|1=1708}} {{ill|April 28|en|April 28|WD=Q2534|lt=April 28|1=April 28}}) – A great fire (the “Hōei no Taika”) broke out in Kyoto, destroying approximately 14,000 houses. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1831|en|1831|WD=Q7579|lt=1831|1=1831}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20|1=April 20}}) – Osaka Machi Bugyō, Shinmi Masaji, dredged the sediment at the mouth of the old Yodogawa (安治川) to build Tenpō-zan.
== Births == * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|WD=Q1145723|lt=Kangen|1=Kan'en}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1246|en|1246|WD=Q5441|lt=1246|1=1246}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|WD=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – {{ill|Nikkō Shōnin|en|Nikkō Shōnin|WD=Q373169|lt=Nikkō Tennō|1=Nikkō Shōnin}}, a monk (died {{ill|1333|en|1333|WD=Q6004|lt=1333|1=1333}})<ref>{{Sfn | 宗旨建立750th year 慶祝記念出版委員会 | 2002 | p = 187 |qq=}}</ref>.
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|April 20|en|April 20|WD=Q2524|lt=April 20|1=April 20}}) – {{ill|Ōhara Yūgaku|en|Ōhara Yūgaku|WD=Q11433147|lt=Ōhara Yūgaku|1=Ōhara Yūgaku}}, an agricultural scholar (born {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797|1=1797}}).
